EmailTemplate.name: C-Check Time Limit
EmailTemplate.subject: C-Check Cross Time Limit
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear Sir/ Madam, This is to notify you that the Aircraft {!leaseworks__Aircraft__c.Name} that you leased has crossed its limit for it's C-Check {!leaseworks__Aircraft__c.leaseworks__Time_Remaining_To_Check__c}.
Your urgent attention to this matter is kindly appreciated:
Sincerely,Company Management
